LanguageData.XF_HappyFool.stages.0.label: Wow! What exactly is this?
LanguageData.XF_HappyFool.stages.0.description: Knowledge brings us wisdom, while ignorance brings us joy.
LanguageData.XF_ExhaustedFlame.stages.0.label: The Exhausted Flame
LanguageData.XF_ExhaustedFlame.stages.0.description: The Strange Ancient has been laid to rest.
LanguageData.XF_PxB.stages.0.label: Blood of Phoenix
LanguageData.XF_PxB.stages.0.description: The body feels as if it's being scorched by flames; is this what they call "Hot Blood"?
LanguageData.XF_songT.stages.0.label: Vocal Infection
LanguageData.XF_songT.stages.0.description: Is this the power of music?
LanguageData.XF_songB.stages.0.label: Vocal Pollution
LanguageData.XF_appleT.stages.0.label: Delusions
LanguageData.XF_appleT.stages.0.description: My mind is filled with bold ideas and RJW's delusions, making me feel terribly uncomfortable.
